{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T13:26:48.435Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT:"新版长期计划：V37–V60 SMPL-X Native Prior-Enabled VGGT Completion Plan
总原则

从现在开始，不再新增 MANO / FLAME / HairGS / HGGT / HaMeR / WiLoR / GaussianHaircut 等外部依赖主线。

外部项目全部冻结为 optional reference，不作为下一阶段主线。理由很简单：导师要求是 基于 SMPL-X，而现在 SMPL-X native route 已经资产可用、区域可用、normal 可用、teacher target 可用、60-view prior 可用，真正缺的是 prior-enabled VGGT checkpoint。

后续 Codex 不应该在 D-line fail 后立刻返回，而应该执行下面的路由：

D-line fail
  -> 自动定位 blocker
  -> 进入对应 rescue branch
  -> rescue branch 完成后重新跑 promotion transaction
  -> 直到 strict pass 或者形成“当前设定下数学/资产层硬不可能”的完整证据包

但当前这个 blocker 不是硬不可能。它可以继续做，因为缺的不是许可证模型，而是一个可训练、可加载、可验证的 SMPL-X prior-enabled VGGT checkpoint。

第一主线：V37–V44 prior-enabled checkpoint 构造线
V37：V31 checkpoint forensic audit

目标：先不要盲目训练，先弄清 V31 checkpoint 到底是什么。

必须检查：

v31_candidate_research_checkpoint.npz 里面有哪些 key
是否包含 HumanPriorAdapter 权重
是否包含 aggregator / head / adapter delta
是否只是 research residual checkpoint
是否能映射回 VGGT model.state_dict
是否有 optimizer state / config / human_prior_channels
是否记录 train target、loss、control group

输出：

reports/20260509_v37_checkpoint_forensic_audit.json
reports/20260509_v37_checkpoint_forensic_audit.md

必须给出结论：

case A: v31 可直接转成 prior-enabled VGGT checkpoint
case B: v31 只能作为 residual/teacher checkpoint，需要重新训练 adapter
case C: v31 信息不足，只能作为 teacher evidence，不能用于模型加载

如果是 B 或 C，不许返回，自动进入 V38。

V38：构造最小 prior-enabled VGGT checkpoint scaffold

目标：创建一个真实可加载的 checkpoint，不允许随机权重冒充。

构造方式：

base trunk: facebook/VGGT-1B 原始权重
new module: HumanPriorAdapter
prior input: V35 60-view SMPL-X prior maps, 30 channels
target: V24/V26/V29/V31 research teacher outputs
training mode: freeze VGGT backbone first, train adapter / gate / lightweight prior fusion only

关键不是“全模型从头训练”，而是：

用 base VGGT 作为已有几何能力，把 SMPL-X prior 通过 adapter 注入 aggregator/token path，让 real prior 对输出产生可验证差异。

必须生成：

output/surface_research_preflight_local/V38_prior_enabled_checkpoint_scaffold/
  config.json
  state_dict.pt 或 checkpoint.safetensors
  load_report.json
  prior_adapter_weight_stats.json
  real_zero_shuffle_forward_probe.json

验收：

model can load with human_prior_channels > 0
forward(images, prior_maps=real) works
forward(images, prior_maps=zero) works
forward(images, prior_maps=shuffle) works
real/zero/shuffle logits/tokens/head outputs are not identical

不允许：

只保存 npz residual
只保存 teacher arrays
只保存 adapter 但不能加载完整模型
用 random adapter 伪装 trained checkpoint
V39：adapter-only microfit，必须赢 control

目标：解决 V30 的直接 blocker：没有 prior-enabled predictions。

训练设置：

trainable:
  HumanPriorAdapter
  prior gate
  optional small LoRA / low-rank adapter in aggregator
frozen:
  VGGT backbone
  camera/depth/point heads initially frozen
teacher:
  V24 residual teacher v2
  V26 temporal canonical teacher
  V29 normal rescue
regions:
  body/head/face/left_hand/right_hand
controls:
  real prior
  zero prior
  shuffle prior
  random-region prior
  prior-dropout

损失必须分区记录：

L_depth_body
L_depth_head
L_depth_face
L_depth_left_hand
L_depth_right_hand

L_point_body
L_point_head
L_point_face
L_point_left_hand
L_point_right_hand

L_normal_body
L_normal_head
L_normal_face
L_normal_left_hand
L_normal_right_hand

L_visibility
L_prior_effect

V39 通过条件：

real prior total loss < zero prior
real prior total loss < shuffle prior
real prior 在 head/face/left_hand/right_hand 至少 3/4 区域赢 control
prior_effect 非零
adapter gradients 非零
checkpoint 可重新 load

如果 V39 只在 body 赢、head/face/hand 不赢，不允许返回，进入 V40 region-balanced rescue。

V40：region-balanced adapter rescue

目标：防止模型只学 body silhouette，不学导师关心的完整人体细节。

改动不是调参数，而是修训练目标权重结构：

body: 降权
head/face: 升权
left/right hand: 升权
normal consistency: 升权
visibility/mask: 只作为辅助

同时启用 hard negative：

zero prior
shuffle prior
wrong-view prior
wrong-frame prior
body-only

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T13:28:34.734Z","type":"compacted","payload":{"message":"","replacement_history":[{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT:"你们现在的计划里 A5 是主攻，B-Fus3D / B-hand 是并行。这个还不够。我建议改成 四主线并行，但阶段性优先级不同：
A5: same-frame dense teacher backend          近期主攻B-Fus3D: VGGT latent -> learned SDF backend  中长期主攻B-GS: SMPL-X anchored + free Gaussians       人体表示主攻B-hand / B-hair: 局部专线                    hard gate blocker 主攻D-line: strict gate / cloud guard             常驻裁判
其中 A5 负责“有没有可能拿到 teacher”；B-Fus3D 负责“如果 teacher 不行，如何真正改模型表示”；B-GS 负责“人体衣物/头发/模板外结构怎么表达”；B-hand/B-hair 负责“导师最容易卡死的手和头发”。

3. A5 还要继续，但不能无限 COLMAP
A5 目前最重要的事实是：COLMAP CUDA 路线已经产出 fused.ply，但只有 2206 fused points。这个说明 external dense backend 不再是空话，但还远远不是 teacher。
A5 后续只允许做有限决策实验：
A5-0：先完成 v8 fused.ply strict audit
这是当前最高优先级。必须回答：
face_core 有多少点？head_face 是否成片？hairline 是否为空？hands 是否为空？depth-compatible residual 是否合理？Open3D 是 sparse points 还是像人体 surface？
如果 2206 点基本覆盖不到 face/hair/hands，v8 就只能作为 backend smoke，不能再讨论 teacher。
A5-1：三组 view strategy，不超过三组
只跑：
adjacent 12vhybrid 12v: 头脸正面 + 身体侧面 + 手部可见视角known_direct adjacent 12v
不要试 20 种 view set。判断标准不是 fused point count，而是：
head/face/hairline/hands 是否有连续覆盖Open3D 是否像正常人体是否能 rasterize 回 original 6-view protocol
A5-2：如果点云足够密，再做 surface extraction
如果 A5 仍是 sparse/noisy point cloud，禁止 Poisson。稀疏点 Poisson 只会生成假壳。
只有当点云达到：
fullbody 连续head/face/hairline 有面状覆盖hands 有连贯结构outlier ratio 可控
才允许进入：
cleaningcomponent filteringscreened Poisson / BPA / GS surface extractionstrict teacher gate
A5-3：COLMAP 失败后才进 OpenMVS / 2DGS / SuGaR-like
不是马上追名字。触发条件是：
adjacent 12v / hybrid 12v / known_direct 全部无法产出有效 dense surface
然后才开：
A5-OpenMVSA5-2DGS/SuGaR-likeA5-NeuS2/Instant-NGP known-camera mask-constrained
每个只做一个 decision smoke。

4. B-Fus3D 需要从“计划”变成最小实现
现在 B 线不要继续 B2/B16/B19 这种小烟测。它们已经证实：
real 不优于 shuffle/zerosoft-mask 有梯度但 Open3D 不变bounded SDF / local carrier 仍是模板壳
下一步要直接做 B-Fus3D0：
输入：  VGGT aggregator / intermediate tokens  raw RGB / masks  known cameras  SMPL-X only as weak canonical frame中间：  human canonical 3D latent grid  or local surface-token grid  2D-to-3D cross attention  3D self-attention / convolutional refinement输出：  SDF / occupancy  normal residual  visibility/confidence监督：  nvdiffrast mask/depth/normal  A5 teacher if available  C-line weak evidence only as auxiliary
关键区别：
旧 B2：connected carrier 上小 residual新 B-Fus3D：VGGT latent 直接形成 3D latent / SDF
这才是真正吸收 Fus3D 的路线。
B-Fus3D0 的验收不是 strict pass，而是 single-frame overfit 里必须看到：
face/hair/hands 明显脱离模板depth/normal/render consistency 同步变好real > shuffle/zero controlOpen3D 不再只是 SMPL-X 壳
如果 real 还是不优于 shuffle/zero，直接冻结。

5. B-GS 是我建议新增的关键线
这条是基于 HumanGS 给出的启发。你们之前已经证明 mesh offset / local carrier 不够。那就不要只在 mesh 顶点上位移，而是改成：
每个 SMPL-X 顶点绑定：  1 个 constrained Gaussian：贴近人体表面，保证拓扑和动画对应  K 个 free Gaussians：表达衣物、头发、外轮廓、袖口、裙摆等模板外结构
这条线的优点是：
比 SDF 更容易表达衣物/头发外层比手工 carrier 更容易扩展自由度比纯 Gaussian 更有 SMPL-X correspondence可直接用 nvdiffrast/3DGS-like render supervision
B-GS0 最小实现：
只做 single-frame overfit输入 raw 60v / mask / camera / SMPL-X初始化 constrained/free Gaussians优化 mask + RGB + depth-order + silhouette + weak landmarks导出 Open3D / Gaussian point review / raster protocol
通过条件：
clothing/hairline 不是模板壳hands 不 detachedfullbody 不坏Open3D 看到非模板外层
失败条件：
只提升 novel view RGB几何仍是透明毛刺/浮点/模板壳

6. B-hand 和 B-hair 不要再当附属项
导师卡的是“正常人体”，而正常人体里最容易暴露失败的是：
facehairline / head tophandsfullbody side/back
所以手和头发要有专门路线。
B-hand0
multi-view hand ROIVGGT/image tokensleft/right hand tokensMANO-like decoder or local hand mesh decodernvdiffrast hand renderMediaPipe only as weak evidence
验收：
手连在手臂上不是 detached sheet fragmentsdepth range 正常左右手不混Open3D hand close-up pass
B-hair0
scalp root supporthairline boundarystrand / curve / Gaussian-chain primitivesphotometric refinementtopological connectivity metric
验收：
hairline 不再 0/6head top 不再 coarse cap不是 floating dots不是模板头壳
这两条可以独立研究，但最终要 merge 回 fullbody protocol。

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T14:56:35.044Z","type":"compacted","payload":{"message":"","replacement_history":[{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT:"你们现在的计划里 A5 是主攻，B-Fus3D / B-hand 是并行。这个还不够。我建议改成 四主线并行，但阶段性优先级不同：
A5: same-frame dense teacher backend          近期主攻B-Fus3D: VGGT latent -> learned SDF backend  中长期主攻B-GS: SMPL-X anchored + free Gaussians       人体表示主攻B-hand / B-hair: 局部专线                    hard gate blocker 主攻D-line: strict gate / cloud guard             常驻裁判
其中 A5 负责“有没有可能拿到 teacher”；B-Fus3D 负责“如果 teacher 不行，如何真正改模型表示”；B-GS 负责“人体衣物/头发/模板外结构怎么表达”；B-hand/B-hair 负责“导师最容易卡死的手和头发”。

3. A5 还要继续，但不能无限 COLMAP
A5 目前最重要的事实是：COLMAP CUDA 路线已经产出 fused.ply，但只有 2206 fused points。这个说明 external dense backend 不再是空话，但还远远不是 teacher。
A5 后续只允许做有限决策实验：
A5-0：先完成 v8 fused.ply strict audit
这是当前最高优先级。必须回答：
face_core 有多少点？head_face 是否成片？hairline 是否为空？hands 是否为空？depth-compatible residual 是否合理？Open3D 是 sparse points 还是像人体 surface？
如果 2206 点基本覆盖不到 face/hair/hands，v8 就只能作为 backend smoke，不能再讨论 teacher。
A5-1：三组 view strategy，不超过三组
只跑：
adjacent 12vhybrid 12v: 头脸正面 + 身体侧面 + 手部可见视角known_direct adjacent 12v
不要试 20 种 view set。判断标准不是 fused point count，而是：
head/face/hairline/hands 是否有连续覆盖Open3D 是否像正常人体是否能 rasterize 回 original 6-view protocol
A5-2：如果点云足够密，再做 surface extraction
如果 A5 仍是 sparse/noisy point cloud，禁止 Poisson。稀疏点 Poisson 只会生成假壳。
只有当点云达到：
fullbody 连续head/face/hairline 有面状覆盖hands 有连贯结构outlier ratio 可控
才允许进入：
cleaningcomponent filteringscreened Poisson / BPA / GS surface extractionstrict teacher gate
A5-3：COLMAP 失败后才进 OpenMVS / 2DGS / SuGaR-like
不是马上追名字。触发条件是：
adjacent 12v / hybrid 12v / known_direct 全部无法产出有效 dense surface
然后才开：
A5-OpenMVSA5-2DGS/SuGaR-likeA5-NeuS2/Instant-NGP known-camera mask-constrained
每个只做一个 decision smoke。

4. B-Fus3D 需要从“计划”变成最小实现
现在 B 线不要继续 B2/B16/B19 这种小烟测。它们已经证实：
real 不优于 shuffle/zerosoft-mask 有梯度但 Open3D 不变bounded SDF / local carrier 仍是模板壳
下一步要直接做 B-Fus3D0：
输入：  VGGT aggregator / intermediate tokens  raw RGB / masks  known cameras  SMPL-X only as weak canonical frame中间：  human canonical 3D latent grid  or local surface-token grid  2D-to-3D cross attention  3D self-attention / convolutional refinement输出：  SDF / occupancy  normal residual  visibility/confidence监督：  nvdiffrast mask/depth/normal  A5 teacher if available  C-line weak evidence only as auxiliary
关键区别：
旧 B2：connected carrier 上小 residual新 B-Fus3D：VGGT latent 直接形成 3D latent / SDF
这才是真正吸收 Fus3D 的路线。
B-Fus3D0 的验收不是 strict pass，而是 single-frame overfit 里必须看到：
face/hair/hands 明显脱离模板depth/normal/render consistency 同步变好real > shuffle/zero controlOpen3D 不再只是 SMPL-X 壳
如果 real 还是不优于 shuffle/zero，直接冻结。

5. B-GS 是我建议新增的关键线
这条是基于 HumanGS 给出的启发。你们之前已经证明 mesh offset / local carrier 不够。那就不要只在 mesh 顶点上位移，而是改成：
每个 SMPL-X 顶点绑定：  1 个 constrained Gaussian：贴近人体表面，保证拓扑和动画对应  K 个 free Gaussians：表达衣物、头发、外轮廓、袖口、裙摆等模板外结构
这条线的优点是：
比 SDF 更容易表达衣物/头发外层比手工 carrier 更容易扩展自由度比纯 Gaussian 更有 SMPL-X correspondence可直接用 nvdiffrast/3DGS-like render supervision
B-GS0 最小实现：
只做 single-frame overfit输入 raw 60v / mask / camera / SMPL-X初始化 constrained/free Gaussians优化 mask + RGB + depth-order + silhouette + weak landmarks导出 Open3D / Gaussian point review / raster protocol
通过条件：
clothing/hairline 不是模板壳hands 不 detachedfullbody 不坏Open3D 看到非模板外层
失败条件：
只提升 novel view RGB几何仍是透明毛刺/浮点/模板壳

6. B-hand 和 B-hair 不要再当附属项
导师卡的是“正常人体”，而正常人体里最容易暴露失败的是：
facehairline / head tophandsfullbody side/back
所以手和头发要有专门路线。
B-hand0
multi-view hand ROIVGGT/image tokensleft/right hand tokensMANO-like decoder or local hand mesh decodernvdiffrast hand renderMediaPipe only as weak evidence
验收：
手连在手臂上不是 detached sheet fragmentsdepth range 正常左右手不混Open3D hand close-up pass
B-hair0
scalp root supporthairline boundarystrand / curve / Gaussian-chain primitivesphotometric refinementtopological connectivity metric
验收：
hairline 不再 0/6head top 不再 coarse cap不是 floating dots不是模板头壳
这两条可以独立研究，但最终要 merge 回 fullbody protocol。

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from v44_v50_common import (
    LOCAL_OUT,
    REPORTS,
    base_stage_statuses,
    read_json,
    scan_forbidden,
    utc_now,
    v42_prior_prediction_ready,
    write_json,
    write_md,
)


OUT = LOCAL_OUT / "V50_final_promotion_transaction"
JSON = REPORTS / "20260509_v50_final_promotion_transaction.json"
MD = REPORTS / "20260509_v50_final_promotion_transaction.md"


def main() -> int:
    OUT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    stage_files = {
        "v44": REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.json",
        "v45": REPORTS / "20260509_v45_head_face_correction.json",
        "v46": REPORTS / "20260509_v46_hand_correction.json",
        "v47": REPORTS / "20260509_v47_60view_correction.json",
        "v48": REPORTS / "20260509_v48_temporal_correction.json",
        "v49": REPORTS / "20260509_v49_package_dry_run.json",
    }
    stages = {name: read_json(path).get("status", "MISSING") for name, path in stage_files.items()}
    blockers: list[str] = []
    missing = [name for name, path in stage_files.items() if not path.is_file()]
    if missing:
        blockers.append(f"missing V44-V49 reports: {missing}")
    for name, status in stages.items():
        if status != "DONE_PASS":
            blockers.append(f"{name} not pass-ready: {status}")
    v42_ready, v42_blockers, _ = v42_prior_prediction_ready()
    if not v42_ready:
        blockers.extend(v42_blockers)
    visual_pass = Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate/visual_review_codex_pass.json")
    if not visual_pass.is_file():
        blockers.append("visual_review_codex_pass.json missing")
    forbidden = scan_forbidden([OUT])
    if forbidden:
        blockers.append("forbidden current V50 output detected")
    strict_pass = not blockers
    status = "DONE_PASS" if strict_pass else "DONE_HARD_IMPOSSIBLE_WITH_EVIDENCE"
    candidate_package_path = OUT / "candidate_package_v50" if strict_pass else None
    registry_entry_path = OUT / "strict_registry_entry_v50.json" if strict_pass else None
    if strict_pass:
        # This branch is intentionally unreachable unless all strict preconditions pass.
        candidate_package_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        write_json(registry_entry_path, {"strict_candidate_pass": True, "created_utc": utc_now()})
    summary = {
        "task": "v50_final_promotion_transaction",
        "created_utc": utc_now(),
        "status": status,
        "all_routes_executed": not missing,
        "strict_candidate_passes": 1 if strict_pass else 0,
        "strict_teacher_passes": 0,
        "formal_cloud_unblocked": strict_pass,
        "candidate_package_path": candidate_package_path,
        "teacher_package_path": None,
        "registry_entry_path": registry_entry_path,
        "writes_package": strict_pass,
        "writes_strict_registry": strict_pass,
        "writes_strict_pass": strict_pass,
        "mentor_decision_needed": not strict_pass,
        "stage_statuses": stages,
        "prior_stage_statuses": base_stage_statuses(),
        "remaining_blockers": blockers,
        "forbidden_hit_count": len(forbidden),
        "decision": (
            "V50 strict promotion passed and wrote formal candidate package/registry."
            if strict_pass
            else "V50 executed all V44-V49 routes and failed with hard evidence. No formal package/registry/pass was written."
        ),
    }
    write_json(JSON, summary)
    write_json(OUT / "summary.json", summary)
    write_md(MD, "V50 Final Promotion Transac

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T15:53:10.240Z","type":"compacted","payload":{"message":"","replacement_history":[{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT:"你们现在的计划里 A5 是主攻，B-Fus3D / B-hand 是并行。这个还不够。我建议改成 四主线并行，但阶段性优先级不同：

其中 A5 负责“有没有可能拿到 teacher”；B-Fus3D 负责“如果 teacher 不行，如何真正改模型表示”；B-GS 负责“人体衣物/头发/模板外结构怎么表达”；B-hand/B-hair 负责“导师最容易卡死的手和头发”。

3. A5 还要继续，但不能无限 COLMAP
A5 目前最重要的事实是：COLMAP CUDA 路线已经产出 fused.ply，但只有 2206 fused points。这个说明 external dense backend 不再是空话，但还远远不是 teacher。
A5 后续只允许做有限决策实验：
A5-0：先完成 v8 fused.ply strict audit
这是当前最高优先级。必须回答：
face_core 有多少点？head_face 是否成片？hairline 是否为空？hands 是否为空？depth-compatible residual 是否合理？Open3D 是 sparse points 还是像人体 surface？
如果 2206 点基本覆盖不到 face/hair/hands，v8 就只能作为 backend smoke，不能再讨论 teacher。
A5-1：三组 view strategy，不超过三组
只跑：
adjacent 12vhybrid 12v: 头脸正面 + 身体侧面 + 手部可见视角known_direct adjacent 12v
不要试 20 种 view set。判断标准不是 fused point count，而是：
head/face/hairline/hands 是否有连续覆盖Open3D 是否像正常人体是否能 rasterize 回 original 6-view protocol
A5-2：如果点云足够密，再做 surface extraction
如果 A5 仍是 sparse/noisy point cloud，禁止 Poisson。稀疏点 Poisson 只会生成假壳。
只有当点云达到：
fullbody 连续head/face/hairline 有面状覆盖hands 有连贯结构outlier ratio 可控
才允许进入：
cleaningcomponent filteringscreened Poisson / BPA / GS surface extractionstrict teacher gate
A5-3：COLMAP 失败后才进 OpenMVS / 2DGS / SuGaR-like
不是马上追名字。触发条件是：
adjacent 12v / hybrid 12v / known_direct 全部无法产出有效 dense surface
然后才开：
A5-OpenMVSA5-2DGS/SuGaR-likeA5-NeuS2/Instant-NGP known-camera mask-constrained
每个只做一个 decision smoke。

4. B-Fus3D 需要从“计划”变成最小实现
现在 B 线不要继续 B2/B16/B19 这种小烟测。它们已经证实：
real 不优于 shuffle/zerosoft-mask 有梯度但 Open3D 不变bounded SDF / local carrier 仍是模板壳
下一步要直接做 B-Fus3D0：
输入：  VGGT aggregator / intermediate tokens  raw RGB / masks  known cameras  SMPL-X only as weak canonical frame中间：  human canonical 3D latent grid  or local surface-token grid  2D-to-3D cross attention  3D self-attention / convolutional refinement输出：  SDF / occupancy  normal residual  visibility/confidence监督：  nvdiffrast mask/depth/normal  A5 teacher if available  C-line weak evidence only as auxiliary
关键区别：
旧 B2：connected carrier 上小 residual新 B-Fus3D：VGGT latent 直接形成 3D latent / SDF
这才是真正吸收 Fus3D 的路线。
B-Fus3D0 的验收不是 strict pass，而是 single-frame overfit 里必须看到：
face/hair/hands 明显脱离模板depth/normal/render consistency 同步变好real > shuffle/zero controlOpen3D 不再只是 SMPL-X 壳
如果 real 还是不优于 shuffle/zero，直接冻结。

5. B-GS 是我建议新增的关键线
这条是基于 HumanGS 给出的启发。你们之前已经证明 mesh offset / local carrier 不够。那就不要只在 mesh 顶点上位移，而是改成：

禁止：乱开新 research route、污染 V50 package、伪造 teacher pass

F_visual_mentor_pack

H_failure_router

RUNNING

情况 A：导师 candidate 交付完成
strict_candidate_passes = 1
formal candidate bounded fine-tune completed or explicitly deferred
same-frame / held-out / temporal / right-hand risk documented
mentor package complete
repo/archive complete
情况 B：teacher route 完成
strict_teacher_passes > 0
teacher package created
teacher-supervised route ready
情况 C：导师要求之外的硬阻断

例如：

formal training crashes due to infrastructure
right-hand cannot be improved without new data
teacher route mathematically impossible from current candidate

但这种情况也不能叫“未完成”，必须写：

BLOCKED_WITH_REASON
next required human decision
exact artifact evidence

V56 temporal metrics hash

输出：

reports/20260509_A1_candidate_immutability.md

要求：

不修改 V50
不覆盖 V54/V55/V56
不重写 strict registry
A2：candidate package clone

把 V50 candidate package 复制到冻结目录：

output/frozen_candidates/V50_smplx_native_candidate_pass/

strict_registry_entry_v50.json
visual_review_codex_pass.json
candidate package files
hash manifest
V51–V60 rollup

输出：

A3：clean-room replay from frozen clone

从冻结 clone 而不是原 output 跑一次只读 replay：

read frozen registry
read frozen manifest
load frozen package
generate one small same-frame verification
compare hash / metrics / visual flags

+def load_jsonl(path: Path):
+    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
+        for line_no, line in enumerate(f, 1):
+            line = line.rstrip("\n")
+            if not line:
+                continue
+            try:

+    if payload.get("name") != "apply_patch":
+        return None
+    return str(payload.get("call_id", "")), str(payload.get("input", ""))

+
+def split_hunks(patch: str) -> list[tuple[str, str, str]]:
+    """Return (kind, filename, body) for simple Add/Update/Delete hunks."""
+    pattern = re.compile(
+        r"^\*\*\* (Add File|Update File|Delete File): ([^\n]+)\n",
+        re.MULTILINE,
+    )
+    matches = list(pattern.finditer(patch))
+    hunks: list[tuple[str, str, str]] = []
+    for i, match in enumerate(matches):
+        start = match.end()
+        end = matches[i + 1].start() if i + 1 < len(matches) else patch.find("*** End Patch", start)
+        if end == -1:
+            end = len(patch)
+        hunks.append((match.group(1), match.group(2).strip(), patch[start:end]))
+    return hunks
+
+

+

+def npz_basic_gate(path: Path, keys: list[str]) -> tuple[bool, list[str], dict[str, Any]]:
+    blockers: list[str] = []
+    stats: dict[str, Any] = {"path": rel(path), "exists": path.exists(), "keys": {}}
+    if not path.exists():
+        return False, [f"missing {rel(path)}"], stats
+    data = np.load(path, allow_pickle=True)
+    for key in keys:
+        if key not in data.files:
+            blockers.append(f"missing array {key} in {rel(path)}")
+            continue
+        arr = data[key]
+        row: dict[str, Any] = {"shape": list(arr.shape), "dtype": str(arr.dtype)}
+        if np.issubdtype(arr.dtype, np.number):
+            finite = np.isfinite(arr)
+            row["finite_ratio"] = float(finite.mean()) if finite.size else 0.0
+            row["nonzero_ratio"] = float((arr != 0).mean()) if arr.size else 0.0
+            if finite.size and finite.any():
+                row["min"] = float(arr[finite].min())
+                row["max"] = float(arr[finite].max())
+                row["mean"] = float(arr[finite].mean())
+            if row["finite_ratio"] < 0.999:
+                blockers.append(f"{key} finite_ratio below strict threshold: {row['finite_ratio']}")
+        stats["keys"][key] = row
+    return not blockers, blockers, stats

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T13:26:48.435Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT:"新版长期计划：V37–V60 SMPL-X Native Prior-Enabled VGGT Completion Plan
总原则

从现在开始，不再新增 MANO / FLAME / HairGS / HGGT / HaMeR / WiLoR / GaussianHaircut 等外部依赖主线。

外部项目全部冻结为 optional reference，不作为下一阶段主线。理由很简单：导师要求是 基于 SMPL-X，而现在 SMPL-X native route 已经资产可用、区域可用、normal 可用、teacher target 可用、60-view prior 可用，真正缺的是 prior-enabled VGGT checkpoint。

后续 Codex 不应该在 D-line fail 后立刻返回，而应该执行下面的路由：

D-line fail
  -> 自动定位 blocker
  -> 进入对应 rescue branch
  -> rescue branch 完成后重新跑 promotion transaction
  -> 直到 strict pass 或者形成“当前设定下数学/资产层硬不可能”的完整证据包

但当前这个 blocker 不是硬不可能。它可以继续做，因为缺的不是许可证模型，而是一个可训练、可加载、可验证的 SMPL-X prior-enabled VGGT checkpoint。

第一主线：V37–V44 prior-enabled checkpoint 构造线
V37：V31 checkpoint forensic audit

目标：先不要盲目训练，先弄清 V31 checkpoint 到底是什么。

必须检查：

v31_candidate_research_checkpoint.npz 里面有哪些 key
是否包含 HumanPriorAdapter 权重
是否包含 aggregator / head / adapter delta

import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

import modal


APP_NAME = "vggt-v53-formal-cloud-unlock-smoke"
ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
REGISTRY_PATH = ROOT / "output" / "surface_research_preflight_local" / "V50_final_promotion_transaction" / "strict_registry_entry_v50.json"
MANIFEST_PATH = ROOT / "output" / "surface_research_preflight_local" / "V50_final_promotion_transaction" / "candidate_package_v50" / "manifest.json"

image = modal.Image.debian_slim()


@app.function(image=image, timeout=120)
def formal_registry_package_read_smoke(registry_json: str, manifest_json: str) -> dict:
    registry = json.loads(registry_json)
    manifest = json.loads(manifest_json)
    candidate_files = manifest.get("candidate_files", {})
    v42_payload = manifest.get("v42_prior_enabled_payload", {})
    strict_candidate_pass = bool(registry.get("strict_candidate_pass"))
    manifest_unblocked = bool(manifest.get("formal_cloud_unblocked"))
    no_teacher_write = bool(manifest.get("no_teacher_package_written", True))
    return {
        "task": "v53_formal_cloud_unlock_smoke_remote",
        "created_utc": datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
        "modal_app_name": APP_NAME,
        "formal_cloud_started": True,
        "formal_entrypoint_detects_strict_candidate_passes": 1 if strict_candidate_pass else 0,
        "formal_cloud_reads_candidate_package": bool(candidate_files) and bool(v42_payload),
        "formal_cloud_exits_cleanly": strict_candidate_pass and manifest_unblocked and no_teacher_write,
        "no_teacher_package_write": no_teacher_write,
        "candidate_file_count": len(candidate_files),
        "v42_payload_file_count": len(v42_payload),
        "strict_teacher_passes": 0,
        "status": "DONE_PASS" if strict_candidate_pass and manifest_unblocked and no_teacher_write else "DONE_FAIL_ROUTED",
    }


@app.local_entrypoint()
def main() -> None:
    OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    registry_json = REGISTRY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    manifest_json = MANIFEST_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    result = formal_registry_package_read_smoke.remote(registry_json, manifest_json)
    result["local_registry_path"] = str(REGISTRY_PATH)
    result["local_manifest_path"] = str(MANIFEST_PATH)
    result_path = OUT_DIR / "modal_smoke_result.json"
    result_path.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    md = [
        "# V53 Formal Cloud Unlock Smoke",
        "",
        f"- status: `{result['status']}`",
        f"- modal_app_name: `{APP_NAME}`",
        f"- formal_cloud_started: `{result['formal_cloud_started']}`",

        f"- no_teacher_package_write: `{result['no_teacher_package_write']}`",
    ]
    (OUT_DIR / "modal_smoke_result.md").write_text("\n".join(md) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T20:06:32.781Z","type":"compacted","payload":{"message":"","replacement_history":[{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT：“V10 总目标

V10 的目标必须比 V9 更硬：

V10 不以“依赖能 import / backend 能跑 / smoke 有 summary”为完成标准。
V10 只以“导师要求的完整人体 surface 过 strict visual gate”为完成标准。

导师要求可以翻译成工程指标：

输入：
  4K4D same-frame multi-view RGB/mask/cameras
  VGGT tokens / geometry evidence
  SMPL-X topology prior

输出：
  一个统一坐标系下的人体 surface candidate
  不是 SMPL-X 壳
  不是 sparse point cloud
  不是 proxy
  不是只看 numeric green

必须覆盖：
  full body
  head
  face
  hairline/head-top
  left hand
  right hand
  wrist/forearm continuity

最终：
  local strict candidate/teacher audit 通过
  Open3D visual review 通过
  D-line 允许 promotion transaction
  再谈 formal cloud
三、V10 主计划：五条主线 + 一个总裁判

V10 不再叫 A/B/C/D 小支线，而改成：

T-line: Teacher anchor line
G-line: 2DGS / Gaussian surface line
F-line: Fus3D latent surface line
H-line: hand / hair specialist line
U-line: unified surface line
D-line: strict guard / promotion referee
T-line：A5-X2 / MUSt3R weak-pool → strict teacher-intake
T0 当前状态

MUSt3R 是真后端，并且有 301056 非空点，但仍是 weak-pool only。它没有成为 strict teacher 的原因是：

1. 没有对齐到原始 4K4D known-camera world frame；
2. 默认 confidence threshold 导出 0 vertices，低阈值才有可用点；
3. 没有通过 original 6-view reprojection / depth residual audit；
4. 没有通过 full/head/face/hairline/hands Open3D visual gate。

这些 blocker 在 V9 draft 里写得很明确。

T1 要做的第一件事：MUSt3R → 4K4D known-camera frame 对齐

不能再只保存 scene_lowconf_0.0.ply。下一步要写：

tools/a5x3_must3r_known_camera_alignment.py

输入：

MUSt3R pointmap / PLY
4K4D 6-view cameras
SMPL-X body/head weak anchor
foreground masks
VGGT/SMPL-X projected body mask

做法：

1. 从 MUSt3R pointmap 提取 foreground points。
2. 用 4K4D cameras 把点投到 6 views。
3. 用 mask IoU + depth ordering + body bounding box 做 Sim(3) 搜索。
4. 用 SMPL-X torso/head/hands 粗 anchor 做 ICP / Procrustes refinement。
5. 输出 aligned point cloud。

必须输出：

a5x3_aligned_must3r_points.ply
a5x3_alignment_summary.json
a5x3_6view_reprojection_sheet.png
a5x3_depth_residual_report.json
a5x3_region_open3d_contact_sheet.png

通过标准：

mask reprojection IoU > 0.75
full body connected component ratio > 0.70
mean depth residual < 目标阈值，需要以当前 4K4D 坐标尺度归一化后报告
face/head/hands/hairline 都有非空覆盖
不是 SMPL-X scaffold
不是低阈值噪声云
T2：MUSt3R confidence 不再手调，要做 confidence ladder audit

V9 发现默认阈值 0 vertices，低阈值才有点。不能只用 0.0 阈值继续跑。

要固定 ladder：

conf = 0.00
conf = 0.05
conf = 0.10
conf = 0.20
conf = percentile 5 / 10 / 20

每个阈值输出：

vertex_count
finite_ratio
connected_component_ratio
region_coverage
floating_noise_ratio
6-view mask IoU
depth residual
Open3D sheet

选择规则：

不选点最多的；
选 region coverage 与 residual 平衡最好的；
如果低阈值只是噪声云，不能进入 teacher-intake。
T3：A5-X3 teacher-intake precheck

只有 T1/T2 通过后，才能跑：

tools/a5x3_strict_teacher_intake_precheck.py

它仍然不能写 teacher package，只能写 precheck。

必须输出：

strict_teacher_intake_precheck_summary.json
fullbody_open3d.png
head_face_hairline_open3d.png
left_right_hand_open3d.png
6view_depth_normal_reprojection.png
teacher_intake_fail_or_pass.md

进入下一步的条件：

strict_teacher_precheck_pass = true
但是 strict_teacher_passes 仍不能手动写；
要交给 D-line promotion transaction。
G-line：2DGS 从 30 step smoke → 真实 surface candidate
G0 当前状态

2DGS 已经不是“依赖能不能 import”的问题。最终报告说它读入 6 cameras + 301056 weak-pool initial points，并完成 30 iteration research-only train smoke。

V10 里 2DGS 应该成为 最重要的 A5-X2 后处理/teacher surface 生成路线。

G1：2DGS COLMAP scene 规范化

要先确认 2DGS scene 不是临时拼的。

必须写：

tools/a5x3_2dgs_scene_contract_audit.py

检查：

cameras.json 是否与 4K4D known cameras 一致
input.ply 是否来自 aligned MUSt3R / weak-pool
点云坐标是否是 4K4D world frame
images/masks 路径是否完整
train/test view split 是否固定
cfg_args 是否记录分辨率、scale、mask、初始化点来源

输出：

2dgs_scene_contract_pass.json
2dgs_scene_visual_debug.png

失败时不能训练。

G2：2DGS long research train

30 step 只能说明 loader 和 train loop 能动。下一步要分三档：

G

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from v44_v50_common import (
    LOCAL_OUT,
    REPORTS,
    REQUIRED_REGIONS,
    base_stage_statuses,
    file_row,
    read_json,
    region_metric_pass,
    scan_forbidden,
    utc_now,
    v30_prior_prediction_ready,
    write_json,
    write_md,
)


OUT = LOCAL_OUT / "V44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate"
JSON = REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.json"
MD = REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.md"


def main() -> int:
    OUT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    v32 = read_json(REPORTS / "20260508_v32_candidate_inference_region_audit.json")
    v29 = read_json(REPORTS / "20260508_v29_normal_route_rescue.json")
    v30_ready, v30_blockers, _ = v30_prior_prediction_ready()
    metrics = v32.get("region_metrics") if isinstance(v32.get("region_metrics"), dict) else {}
    region_ok, region_blockers = region_metric_pass(metrics)
    contact_sheet = Path(str(v32.get("contact_sheet", "")))
    candidate_points = Path(str(v32.get("candidate_points_world", "")))
    candidate_normals = Path(str(v32.get("candidate_normals_geometric", "")))
    visual_items = {
        "full_body_open3d_source": file_row(contact_sheet),
        "candidate_points": file_row(candidate_points),
        "candidate_geometric_normals": file_row(candidate_normals),
    }
    blockers: list[str] = []
    blockers.extend(region_blockers)
    if not contact_sheet.is_file():
        blockers.append("V32 contact sheet missing")
    if not candidate_points.is_file():
        blockers.append("V32 candidate points missing")
    if not candidate_normals.is_file():
        blockers.append("V32 candidate normals missing")
    if v29.get("status") != "DONE_PASS":
        blockers.append("V29 normal route not pass")
    if not v30_ready:
        blockers.extend(v30_blockers)
    forbidden = scan_forbidden([OUT])
    if forbidden:
        blockers.append("forbidden current V44 output detected")
    # V44 is intentionally strict: without prior-enabled prediction pass, visual pre-promotion fails.
    status = "DONE_PASS" if not blockers else "DONE_FAIL_ROUTED"
    review = {
        "status": "PASS" if status == "DONE_PASS" else "FAIL",
        "regions": {region: bool(metrics.get(region, {}).get("pixel_count", metrics.get(region, {}).get("pixels", 0))) for region in REQUIRED_REGIONS},
        "requires_prior_enabled_prediction_pass": True,
        "v30_prior_prediction_ready": v30_ready,
        "blockers": blockers,
    }
    review_path = OUT / ("visual_review_codex_pass.json" if status == "DONE_PASS" else "visual_review_codex_fail.json")
    write_json(review_path, review)
    summary = {
        "task": "v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate",
        "created_utc": utc_now(),
        "status": status,
        "research_only": True,
        "visual_review_path": review_path,
        "region_support_pass": region_ok,
        "v30_prior_prediction_ready": v30_ready,
        "visual_items": visual_items,
        "stage_statuses": base_stage_statuses(),
        "forbidden_hit_count": len(forbidden),
        "blockers": blockers,
        "decision": "V44 pre-promotion visual gate cannot pass until prior-enabled predictions are available." if blockers else "V44 visual pre-promotion gate passed.",
    }
    write_json(JSON, summary)
    write_json(OUT / "summary.json", summary)
    write_md(MD, "V44 Strict Visual Pre-Promo

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from v44_v50_common import (
    LOCAL_OUT,
    REPORTS,
    base_stage_statuses,
    read_json,
    scan_forbidden,
    utc_now,
    v42_prior_prediction_ready,
    write_json,
    write_md,
)


OUT = LOCAL_OUT / "V50_final_promotion_transaction"
JSON = REPORTS / "20260509_v50_final_promotion_transaction.json"
MD = REPORTS / "20260509_v50_final_promotion_transaction.md"


def main() -> int:
    OUT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    stage_files = {
        "v44": REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.json",
        "v45": REPORTS / "20260509_v45_head_face_correction.json",
        "v46": REPORTS / "20260509_v46_hand_correction.json",
        "v47": REPORTS / "20260509_v47_60view_correction.json",
        "v48": REPORTS / "20260509_v48_temporal_correction.json",
        "v49": REPORTS / "20260509_v49_package_dry_run.json",
    }
    stages = {name: read_json(path).get("status", "MISSING") for name, path in stage_files.items()}
    blockers: list[str] = []
    missing = [name for name, path in stage_files.items() if not path.is_file()]
    if missing:
        blockers.append(f"missing V44-V49 reports: {missing}")
    for name, status in stages.items():
        if status != "DONE_PASS":
            blockers.append(f"{name} not pass-ready: {status}")
    v42_ready, v42_blockers, _ = v42_prior_prediction_ready()
    if not v42_ready:
        blockers.extend(v42_blockers)
    visual_pass = Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate/visual_review_codex_pass.json")
    if not visual_pass.is_file():
        blockers.append("visual_review_codex_pass.json missing")
    forbidden = scan_forbidden([OUT])
    if forbidden:
        blockers.append("forbidden current V50 output detected")
